case_title: STEPHEN L CRAIG VS. TEXTAINER EQUIPMENT MANAGEMENT LTD et al

docket_entries.description: ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT RFH LTD

BUSINESS TORT, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CRAIG, STEPHEN L INDIVIDUALLY AND ON BEHALF OF ALL OTHERS SIMILARLY SITUATED AS TO DEFENDANT TEXTAINER EQUIPMENT MANAGEMENT LTD TEXTAINER FINANCIAL SERVICES CORPORATION TEXTAINER CAPITAL CORPORATION TEXTAINER LIMITED RFH LTD DOES 1-25 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR AUG-24-2007 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  MAY-21-2007 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         AUG-09-2007 COMPLEX LITIGATION ASSIGNMENT REQUESTED BY FILING PARTIES; FEE INCLUDED IN FILING FEE

NOT REPORTED. CASE DESIGNATED COMPLEX AT HEARING ON MAR-28-2007 IN DEPT. 304, AND ASSIGNED TO JUDGE RICHARD A. KRAMER FOR ALL PURPOSES. THIS ACTION IS CONSOLIDATED WITH IN RE TEXTAINER FINANCIAL SERVICES CORPORATION, CGC-05-440303. ALL FUTURE FILING SHALL BE DONE IN THE LEAD CASE. A CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS SET FOR OCT-30-2007 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 304. THE OCT-05-2007 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IN DEPT. 212 IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY THE COURT ON SEP-28-2007. JUDGE RICHARD A. KRAMER, CLERK FELICIA GREEN, DEPT. 304.
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF AUG-24-2007 CONTINUED TO OCT-05-2007 AT 9:00 AM IN DEPT. 212, FOR ANSWER(S) BY TEXTAINER DEFENDANTS. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
